# DOThtml
> A lightweight, reactive UI engine and framework for building modern web applications with zero dependencies.

## Core Documentation
- [Quick Start & Installation](https://dothtml.org/docs/quick-start.md): Get up and running with DOThtml in minutes.
- [Official CLI](https://dothtml.org/docs/cli.md): Scaffolding projects and generating components with create-dothtml.
- [Rendering Basics](https://dothtml.org/docs/rendering-basics.md): Fundamental rendering API, element creation, and nesting.
- [Main Features](https://dothtml.org/docs/main-features.md): High-level overview of DOThtml's core capabilities and philosophy.
- [Use Cases](https://dothtml.org/docs/use-cases.md): When to choose DOThtml for your project.

## API & Features
- [Components](https://dothtml.org/docs/components.md): Building blocks, props, validation, lifecycle hooks, and advanced event handling.
- [Reactivity](https://dothtml.org/docs/reactivity.md): Signals, computed state, and reactive bindings.
- [Stores](https://dothtml.org/docs/stores.md): Centralized state management for enterprise-scale applications.
- [Refs](https://dothtml.org/docs/refs.md): Direct access to DOM elements and component instances.
- [Scroll & Visibility](https://dothtml.org/docs/scroll-and-visibility.md): Global scroll tracking and element visibility detection.
- [Styling](https://dothtml.org/docs/styling.md): Fluent, reactive, and high-performance styling system.
- [Routing](https://dothtml.org/docs/routing.md): Reactive routing with navigation guards and lazy loading.
- [Popups](https://dothtml.org/docs/popups.md): Multi-window orchestration layer with shared state and style inheritance.
- [TypeScript](https://dothtml.org/docs/typescript.md): First-class TypeScript support with full type safety for components, props, and refs.

## Deep Dives
- [Benchmarks](https://dothtml.org/docs/benchmarks.md): Performance comparisons against React, Vue, and Svelte.
- [Detailed Features](https://dothtml.org/docs/detailed-features.md): Technical deep-dive into performance internals, update batching, and advanced APIs.
- [Hero Features](https://dothtml.org/docs/hero-features.md): Key highlights and unique selling points.

## Community
- [Learn More & Contribute](https://dothtml.org/docs/learn-more.md): Additional resources and information on how to contribute to the project.
